name: awac-ai-agent-plugins
description: Custom AI agent plugins by Ivan Lutsenko

plugins.name: crashlytics
plugins.description: Multi-platform crash analysis for Android & iOS with git blame forensics, code-level fixes, and a major-pinned Firebase MCP launcher. Language-aware validator (en/ru/es/de/fr/pt/it), origin/<branch> forensics. MCP-primary fetch with REST API fallback.

plugins.name: obsidian-tracker
plugins.description: Project tracking, task management with kanban boards, bug logging, decision records (ADR), session management, and engineering traceability via Obsidian

plugins.name: locale-notifications
plugins.description: Localized macOS notifications for Claude Code with safe quoted messages, cwd-based config lookup, and cached auto-translation

plugins.name: auto-theme
plugins.description: Syncs Claude Code and Codex themes with macOS system appearance (light/dark) on every prompt. Bundles custom gruvbox-light / sunset-drive themes and installs them on first run.

plugins.name: combined-review
plugins.description: Combined code review: multi-agent analysis (code-reviewer, git-historian, silent-failure-hunter, test-analyzer) + CodeRabbit CLI. GitHub PR + GitLab MR (inline threads).

plugins.name: clip-maker
plugins.description: Automated vertical clip creator for talks: whisper + Claude (moments + smart crop) + ffmpeg, with safer script argument handling and error reporting

plugins.name: drawbridge
plugins.description: Bridge between a short brief and image-gen web UIs (Gemini/ChatGPT/Grok/Midjourney). Crafts target-tuned prompt, copies to clipboard, opens the UI — no API keys; frontmatter parsing no longer reopens from markdown hr lines.

plugins.name: plugin-cross-port
plugins.description: Bidirectional conversion between Claude Code and Codex plugin formats. CC → Codex and Codex → CC, one-shot or continuous. Auto-converts agents to standalone Codex skills.
